ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Pitcher, Catcher) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., Active, Injured, Retired) */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Player's batting side (e.g., Right, Left, Switch) */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Player's throwing side (e.g., Right, Left) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* Date when the player's current contract expires */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Player's current salary */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the player's record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., MLB, AAA) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team manager */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the team's record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the season starts */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the season ends */,
  "regular_season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "regular_season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "postseason_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the postseason */,
  "postseason_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the postseason */,
  "finals_winner" TEXT /* Name of the team that won the finals */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the season's record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_seasons" (
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-season record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of base on balls */,
  "hbp" INTEGER /* Number of times hit by pitch */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "batting_average" TEXT /* Player's batting average */,
  "on_base_percentage" TEXT /* Player's on-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" TEXT /* Player's slugging percentage */,
  "earned_run_average" TEXT /* Player's earned run average */,
  "whip" TEXT /* Player's walks plus hits per inning pitched */,
  "fielding_percentage" TEXT /* Player's fielding percentage */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the player's seasonal record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_career_totals" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Total number of at-bats */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total number of runs scored */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total number of hits */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Total number of runs batted in */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Total number of base on balls */,
  "hbp" INTEGER /* Total number of times hit by pitch */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Total number of stolen bases */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Total number of games started */,
  "batting_average" TEXT /* Career batting average */,
  "on_base_percentage" TEXT /* Career on-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" TEXT /* Career slugging percentage */,
  "earned_run_average" TEXT /* Career earned run average */,
  "whip" TEXT /* Career walks plus hits per inning pitched */,
  "fielding_percentage" TEXT /* Career fielding percentage */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the player's career record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Player) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the user's record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose statistics were accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the access log was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Pitcher, Catcher) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_position_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position history record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the player started playing the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the player stopped playing the position */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the change in position */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the position history record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_position_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_position_history_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES player_positions ("position_id")
)
